_meta.purpose: Inventory of all user-facing copy with design locations
_meta.note: Source text only, recorded verbatim and NOT translated. The site is mixed-language: global chrome, metadata, and the mobile shop layouts are Farsi (RTL); most desktop shop pages, mentorship, blog, forum and about are English. Strings are recorded exactly as currently written regardless of language. HTML entities are shown as their rendered characters (e.g. ' " —). Decorative glyph-only strings (✦ → ◆ emoji) and values pulled from the data layer (mock-data.ts, hardcoded product/post/article arrays) are excluded from the inventory and summarized in _review.
coverage: global chrome (nav, footer, feature badges, toasts)

_review: Excluded as data/seed content (not UI copy) — flag if these need to be editable: product catalog arrays hardcoded in components (NOT mock-data.ts): /shop/stones-v2 PRODUCTS (names Amethyst/Rose Quartz/Citrine/Clear Quartz/Labradorite, their quality tags e.g. Calm/Intuition/Protection, and prices); /shop/clothes ProductCards.tsx PRODUCTS (Luna Meditation Robe, Sol Yoga Top, Gaia Flow Pants, Nova Energy Shirt + prices); mentorship session prices/durations (e.g. '60 Min', '$222'); blog LATEST_ARTICLES + FEATURED article titles/dates/authors/read-times (e.g. 'The Power of Inner Stillness', 'Remembering Who You Truly Are', 'Luna Elise'); forum POSTS sample content (authors, titles, excerpts, dates).

Defined but NOT currently rendered: app/page.tsx SECTIONS[].viewAllLabel values ('مشاهده همه سنگ‌ها', 'مشاهده همه شمع‌ها', 'مشاهده همه اکسسوری‌ها', 'مشاهده همه پوشاک') are passed to BestSellersSection but never displayed (component does not render viewAllLabel). Not inventoried as visible copy.

Brand-name inconsistency (worth a designer/content decision): 'Aura Mystic' / 'اورا میستیک' (header, footer, metadata), 'FARED' (mobile menu wordmark), 'Lumina Crystals' (Community/forum <title>), 'Auravista' (About + About/Story story body). Founder is 'Fard' on mentorship & forum.

app/layout.tsx also defines metadata.keywords and openGraph title/description (Farsi). Not user-visible on the page; excluded as pure SEO/social metadata — include later if a meta inventory is wanted.
Metadata coverage: only /community (forum) sets a per-page document <title>. Other listed routes inherit the global app/layout.tsx title; no per-page meta descriptions were found on them.

Currency/number formatting: prices show as USD ($) on most desktop/English pages; OrderSummary uses Toman ('تومان') with fa-IR digits; BestSellersSection product data uses Toman. Mixed currency is a content decision, not an extraction issue.

Out of scope (exist in the app but not in the requested coverage list, so NOT extracted): /shop/tours, /shop/stones-v3, /shop/clothes-v3, /shop/* product & [id] detail pages, /cart, /product/[id], /tahrirye + /tahririye (editorial), /journal, /quotes, /faq, /energy-guide, /auth (+login/register), /account (+orders), /profile, /blog/[slug], /forum/[id]. Say the word to inventory any of these.
